ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Registered address of the company */,
  "business_registration_number" TEXT /* Business registration number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_types" (
  "dividend_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend type (e.g., Cash, Stock, Special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend type */,
  "tax_implication" TEXT /* Tax implication of the dividend type (e.g., taxable, non-taxable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the shareholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the shareholder */,
  "taxpayer_id" TEXT /* Taxpayer ID of the shareholder */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the shareholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_events" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company issuing the dividend */,
  "dividend_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of dividend */,
  "cash_amount" REAL /* Amount of cash dividend per share */,
  "ex_eff_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date (date on which the dividend is no longer payable to new buyers) */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared by the board */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date (date used to determine shareholders eligible for the dividend) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or body that approved the dividend */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dividend event (e.g., declared, paid, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dividend event */,
  "meeting_minutes" TEXT /* Meeting minutes from the board meeting where the dividend was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_events_dividend_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_type_id") REFERENCES dividend_types ("dividend_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder receiving the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Confirmation number of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_implications" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax implication record */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the dividend payment */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax on the dividend payment */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status (e.g., single, married) */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the tax was filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_implications_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_implications_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholder */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the shareholder on the record date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date used to determine eligibility for the dividend */,
  "eligibility_status" TEXT /* Eligibility status of the shareholder (e.g., eligible, not eligible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_records_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_records_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or body that approved the dividend */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was approved */,
  "approval_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_approvals_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the dividend */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance was completed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "regulatory_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the relevant regulatory requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_compliance_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial officer, compliance officer, external auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend event being audited */,
  "audit_event" TEXT /* Type of audit event (e.g., system access, data modification) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit event occurred */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_events ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_requirements" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory requirement */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the requirement */,
  "regulatory_requirement" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory requirement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_authorities" (
  "tax_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax authority */,
  "tax_authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax authority */,
  "tax_authority_type" TEXT /* Type of tax authority (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_authority_id")
)
